# Copilot Agents

Custom GitHub Copilot agent definitions that provide specialised modes for different development tasks.

## Agents

| Agent | File | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Coder** | `coder.agent.md` | Implementation-focused agent for writing code following project conventions |
| **Designer** | `designer.agent.md` | UI/UX-focused agent for design tasks and component styling |
| **Orchestrator** | `orchestrator.agent.md` | Coordinates multi-step tasks across the full stack |
| **Planner** | `planner.agent.md` | Creates detailed implementation plans before coding |
